response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience spanning frontend, backend, mobile, and embedded work. Core stack alignment is strong: extensive TypeScript/Node.js and React experience at Optilyz and RIDE, MongoDB and SQL databases, AWS and Kubernetes exposure, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, which directly matches the unusual 'AI agent development' requirement. A deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are minor: Nest.js and Kotlin are not explicitly mentioned, and some career depth is invested in the niche D language rather than the JVM secondary stack.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React alignment
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught courses)
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated; Python not listed
Significant investment in niche D-language ecosystem rather than the JVM secondary stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java coverage
